what is natural language processing.answer: According to PDFDrive.com's Introduction to Machine Learning with Python (min.pdf), natural language processing is not explicitly defined in the provided context; however, it can be inferred from source page 339 that NLP involves analyzing text data which includes phrases or sentences found in various sources like tweets and hotel reviews.
